Experience the exceptional flavour and tenderness of Australian Farmed Luv-a-Duck.  Our ducks are grown in the Wimmera region of Victoria and fed on locally sourced grain, delivering a rich, natural flavour and texture.

Slow cooked duck in a classic mild Thai Red Curry Sauce.

To create your own personal touch consider adding coconut milk, pineapple, vegetables or for an extra kick some additional chilli or spices whilst the product is simmering.

Serve with rice.

Why you’ll luv our Confit Duck Legs: 100% Australian farm grown	No added hormones, artificial colours or flavours	Naturally contains protein and iron	Gluten Free & Halal certified

Luv-a-Duck is a third-generation family-owned Australian company dedicated to producing quality duck products.
